issues.description: Content duplication between slide1_content and slide2_content - first four paragraphs are identical
issues.suggestion: Remove duplicate content and ensure each slide has unique, progressive information

issues.description: Missing clear transition between slides - content jumps abruptly
issues.suggestion: Add transitional phrases or headers to guide readers through the progression

issues.description: Discussion questions could be more explicitly tied to citing textual evidence
issues.suggestion: Rephrase questions to require students to identify specific text evidence (e.g., 'What specific evidence from paragraph 2 shows...')

issues.description: Some vocabulary terms appear in text before being defined
issues.suggestion: Introduce key vocabulary earlier or provide context clues within the passage

issues.description: Text complexity is appropriate but could benefit from more explicit inference opportunities
issues.suggestion: Add more implicit information that requires students to read between the lines
